| \\ Daily Value (DV) not established Other Ingredients: Dried Apple Cider Vinegar, Natural Flavors, Citric Acid, Monk Fruit Extract, Beta Carotene (color) | | | [...] ### DigeZyme¬ģ Multi-Enzyme Compl

DigeZyme¬ģ Multi-Enzyme Complex delivers on the goal of supporting both the upper and lower GI tracts, our research led us to a multi-enzyme complex containing five digestive enzymes called DigeZyme¬ģ. It uses ‚Äúmicrobial‚ÄĚ or ‚Äúplant-derived‚ÄĚ enzymes giving broad enzyme support, and has been studied in humans. DigeZyme¬ģ contains five enzymes: őĪ‚ÄďAmylase to help break down starches; Cellulase to help break down plant cell walls in fruits and vegetables; Lipase to promote the breakdown of fats; Protease to help break down proteins; and Lactase to help break down the milk sugar (lactose) found in some dairy products\

## Learn More About The Other Ingredients [...] ### Fermeric‚ĄĘ Fermented Turmeric

Fermeric‚ĄĘ Fermented Turmeric  A fermented turmeric containing inactive cells of Lactobacillus plantarum. It also contains compounds and metabolites produced during fermentation. The fermentation process used to make Fermeric‚ĄĘ enhances the antioxidant content of the turmeric and transforms health-promoting curcuminoids into forms that can be more easily absorbed.\ We chose our suggested amount to supply one billion cells of inactivated Lactobacillus plantarum. As a postbiotic, it has been mostly studied for supporting the gut-immune axis and the health of the gut barrier.\

### Fibriss‚ĄĘ Organic Baobab Fruit Pulp Powder
